use_cases: Displaying media content that expands to a full-screen modal view with smooth transitions
Creating interactive product cards in e-commerce that reveal detailed information on click
Building FAQ or content sections with expandable details and backdrop blur overlay
Implementing image galleries where thumbnails expand into focused full-screen views
Adding dismissible detail views with keyboard (Escape) and click-outside close functionality
ai_summary: An expandable card component that transforms from a compact card view into a full-screen modal with smooth layout animations using Framer Motion. Features glassmorphism-style backdrop blur overlay, keyboard navigation (Escape to close), and click-outside detection for dismissal. Ideal for displaying media, products, or content that requires a detailed view without navigating away from the current page.
